desc: Sets the Revit selection to the given element IDs.
summary: Sets the Revit selection to the given element IDs. Use after MEPBridge.Revit.AIChat.Services.CustomTools.SelectByIdsTool exports IDs, or after get_selection to work through IDs one at a time in a cross-off workflow. Called by MEPBridge.Revit.AIChat.Services.CustomTools.SelectByIdsTool via execute_command. Related: SelectByLocationCommand for coordinate-based selection, SelectByRoomCommand for room-based selection.
usecase: Cross-off workflow: list rads → get IDs → select_by_ids(one id) → act → next.
notfor: Selecting by category/family/room — use SelectByRoomCommand or other selection commands first, then this with their IDs.
precondition: Active document; elementIds = JSON array [1,2,3] or comma-separated numbers.
postcondition: Selection is set to valid IDs; result returns success and count.

config_inputs.name: elementIds
config_inputs.description: JSON array of IDs [1,2,3] or comma-separated numbers

preprompts: Setting selection to the specified element IDs...
